title: POS Invoice Event
description: A point-of-sale invoice event from Aurora MySQL. Tracks checkout transactions and refunds.

invoice_id.description: Unique identifier for the POS invoice.

event_ts.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this event occurred.

refund_flag.description: True if this invoice represents a refund transaction.

order_id.description: Linked sales order ID for capture-rate tracking.

brand_tier.description: Product brand tier for revenue-mix analysis.
